name: aws-app-platform
description: Reusable AWS platform for low-cost web applications.

scripts.test: echo "Automated tests are not wired in yet."
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api && npm run build:infra
scripts.infra:synth: npm run build:web && npm run build:infra && npm run synth --workspace aws-app-platform-infra
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build:web && npm run build:infra && npm run deploy:dev --workspace aws-app-platform-infra
scripts.deploy:stage: npm run build:web && npm run build:infra && npm run deploy:stage --workspace aws-app-platform-infra
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:web && npm run build:infra && npm run deploy:prod --workspace aws-app-platform-infra
